isi.lyrics:
Lyric Panini Brunch - 사랑해 매일매일 (I love you everyday)

Romanization

saranghae maeilmaeil saranghae oraetorok sojunghan sunggan uri modeun naldeul
gieokhae kkumeseodo pogeunhi ana julge areumdaun bitcheoreom ttaseuhi chajaon sarangeul wihae

bogiman haedo joa jeombuda joa haneopsi jugo sipeun geureon maeum
geudaeroyeodo joa neoraseo joa yeongwonhi hamkkehago sipeo

oneuldo gippeohamyeo naeildo neomu gamsahae na uriga hamkkehaneun i sunggan

saranghae maeilmaeil saranghae oraetorok sojunghan sunggan uri modeun naldeul
gieokhae kkumeseodo pogeunhi anajulge areumdaun bitcheoreom ttaseuhi chajaon sarangeul wihae

dwidolmyeon bogo sipeo tto bogo sipeo jakkuman bogo sipeun ireon maeum
himdeureojil ttaeedo apeul ttaeedo eonjena gyeote isseo julge

majimak onda haedo sesangi galla nondaedo neol uriga hamkkeramyeon da joa

saranghae maeilmaeil saranghae oraetorok sojunghan sunggan uri modeun naldeul
gieokhae kkumeseodo pogeunhi anajulge areumdaun bitcheoreom ttaseuhi chajaon sarangeul

yeongwonhi hanappunin sesange hanappunin sojunghan neoui areumdaun miso
oneuldo malhaejulge neoreul saranghae mani nunibusin chukboge pyeongsaengeul hamkkehal urireul wihae

Hangeul

사랑해 매일매일 사랑해 오래토록 소중한 순간 우리 모든 날들
기억해 꿈에서도 포근히 안아 줄게 아름다운 빛처럼 따스히 찾아온 사랑을 위해

보기만 해도 좋아 전부다 좋아 한없이 주고 싶은 그런 마음
그대로여도 좋아 너라서 좋아 영원히 함께하고 싶어

오늘도 기뻐하며 내일도 너무 감사해 나 우리가 함께하는 이 순간

사랑해 매일매일 사랑해 오래토록 소중한 순간 우리 모든 날들
기억해 꿈에서도 포근히 안아줄게 아름다운 빛처럼 따스히 찾아온 사랑을 위해

뒤돌면 보고 싶어 또 보고 싶어 자꾸만 보고 싶은 이런 마음
힘들어질 때에도 아플 때에도 언제나 곁에 있어 줄게

마지막 온다 해도 세상이 갈라 논대도 널 우리가 함께라면 다 좋아

사랑해 매일매일 사랑해 오래토록 소중한 순간 우리 모든 날들
기억해 꿈에서도 포근히 안아줄게 아름다운 빛처럼 따스히 찾아온 사랑을

영원히 하나뿐인 세상에 하나뿐인 소중한 너의 아름다운 미소
오늘도 말해줄게 너를 사랑해 많이 눈이부신 축복에 평생을 함께할 우리를 위해

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Elaine - Sure

Romanization

This world’s full of questions for me
Some uncertainties
And I try to breathe
Keep my head above

It’s hard to believe
In perfected dreams
When I try to see
What they’re all made of

You help me not forget
That good things haven’t yet
Come and found me
How could I forget
I knew it when we met
You’re the one I’m sure
I’m sure

This world’s full of answers for me
Someone I should be
And I tried every
Ways to feel enough

But the dark clouds I keep
Pervade and haunt me
I sometimes let it
Run through all of my heart

Will you help me not forget
That good things haven’t yet
Come and found me
I’m not going to fret
I knew it when we met
You’re the one I’m sure
I’m sure


Hangeul

This world’s full of questions for me
Some uncertainties
And I try to breathe
Keep my head above

It’s hard to believe
In perfected dreams
When I try to see
What they’re all made of

You help me not forget
That good things haven’t yet
Come and found me
How could I forget
I knew it when we met
You’re the one I’m sure
I’m sure

This world’s full of answers for me
Someone I should be
And I tried every
Ways to feel enough

But the dark clouds I keep
Pervade and haunt me
I sometimes let it
Run through all of my heart

Will you help me not forget
That good things haven’t yet
Come and found me
I’m not going to fret
I knew it when we met
You’re the one I’m sure
I’m sure

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Elaine - 12

Romanization

Your eyes look like the midnight
Makes wonder what you do
Is there a way to let you know
How I feel, how I feel now

I could be wanting something I can’t get
You might have someone waiting for you tonight
But I can’t stop myself from feeling
I don’t wanna stop this feeling
‘Cuz I think you feel it too

Are you on your way?
Are you on your way?
Oh, please love, Are you on your way?
Tell me now, are you on your way?

Tell me I’m not just hoping for the best
Tell me I don’t have to do that
Tell me that you see me
Tell me that you want me
‘Cuz that’d be something good

Are you on your way?
Are you on your way?
Oh, please love, Are you on your way?
Tell me now, are you on your way?

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Elaine - I Don′t Wanna Know

Romanization

I don’t ever wanna know what it’d be like to lose you
I don’t ever wanna dream of my life without you
So pull me closer, don’t you ever leave
If you’re going, I’m coming with

‘Cuz I’m scared of being alone
And I don’t want to be strong

Tell me every day so I don’t lose again
Show me that it’s all in my head
Nothing’s changed, you’re here to stay
I know, but I don’t
So don’t go

I don’t ever wanna miss waking up with you
I don’t care what goes on in this world, I just need you
So pull me closer, don’t you ever leave
If you’re going, I’m coming with

‘Cuz I’m scared of moving on
And I don’t want to learn

I’d close the door

I’d found you

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Elaine - Let′s Move to an Island

Romanization

Let’s move to an island
Where there’re trees and wind that says hello
Let’s take a nap on each other’s body
In a house with nobody but us

Oh, don’t have to bring anything but yourself
And your love for me
I’ll take care of the rest or we could do it together
Run around and fall

Wake up with me
Share the shower with me
Come and dance with me
Let’s roll around in sand

Oh, let’s just get away
Oh, bring new reality
Oh, let’s just get away
Oh, bring new reality
